name: get_selected_objects
full_help:
get_selected_objects

Description: 
Get selected objects

Syntax: 
get_selected_objects  [-primary] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
list of selected objects

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-primary]  Do not include objects that were selected due to selection 
              rules
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Object, GUIControl

arguments.description: Do not include objects that were selected due to selection rules
Suspend message limits during command execution
